title: nie wallet init / nie wallet restore subcommands
description: nie wallet init: generate mnemonic, display it, derive master key, encrypt and save wallet.key. nie wallet restore <mnemonic>: re-derive master key from user-entered mnemonic, encrypt and save. Both commands refuse to overwrite an existing wallet.key without --force. Add Wallet subcommand group to main.rs.
close_reason: nie wallet init / nie wallet restore added to CLI; --force flag; mnemonic shown once
